---
title: "ml2_readmission"
author: "kevin korenblat"
fdate: now
format:
  pdf:
    output-file: "readmission_2026.pdf"
    output-dir: here("ml3.2_manuscript")
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 5
    keep-tex: false
    echo: false
    warning:  false
    message:  false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
```{r}
#| label: load packages

## load packages
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, echo=FALSE)
library(pacman)
p_load("tidyverse",
     "lubridate",
     "readxl",
     "haven",
     "ggprism",
     "here",
     "broom",
     "corrplot",
     "quarto",
     "ggsci",
     "janitor",
     "magrittr",
     "survival",
     "car",
     "openxlsx",
     "excel.link",
     "jtools",
     "plotor",
     "tidymodels",
     "progress",
     "directlabels",
     "flextable",
     "officer",
     "sysfonts",
     "showtext",
     "openxlsx",
     "keras",
     "tensorflow",
     "ids",
     "data.table",
     "pROC","xgboost","caret",
     "zip","gridExtra","utils","tools",
     "grid","scales","table1")

## Readmission models

# ============================================================================
# READMISSION-ONLY ANALYSIS - CLEAN CODE
# Machine Learning Prediction of Readmission After Liver Transplantation
# Author: Kevin Korenblat, MD
# ============================================================================

library(data.table)
library(xgboost)
library(pROC)
library(survival)
library(ggplot2)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(gridExtra)
library(here)

#| label:  load-data
#| cache:  true
#| echo:  false
#| warning:  false
#| message:  

# Set seeds for reproducibility
set.seed(20190804)  # Date of first transplant in cohort

# Load data
db_0.1_coded<-readRDS(here("readmission_rdata","db_0.1_coded.RDS"))

# COHORT DEFINITION -----------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== COHORT DEFINITION ===\n")

# 1. Get unique patients
patient_data <- db_0.1_coded[, .(
  code = code[1],
  gender = gender[1],
  abo = abo[1],
  age_lt = age_lt[1],
  age_don = age_don[1],
  bmi_recip = bmi_recip[1],
  multiorg_id = multiorg_id[1],
  donor_type = donor_type[1],
  final_meld = final_meld_peld_lab_score[1],
  px_stat = px_stat[1],
  px_stat_date = px_stat_date[1],
  hosp_disch_date = hosp_disch_date[1],
  readmit_date = readmit_date[1],
  postop_los = postop_los[1],
  time_to_readmission = time_to_readmission[1],
  dc_code = dc_code[1],
  death_equal_initialdc = death_equal_initialdc[1]
), by = code]

# 2. CRITICAL: Exclude patients who died during index hospitalization
survivors <- patient_data[death_equal_initialdc == 0 & !is.na(hosp_disch_date)]

cat("Total transplants:", nrow(patient_data))
cat("Died during index admission:", sum(patient_data$death_equal_initialdc == 1, na.rm=TRUE))
cat("Survivors (analysis cohort):", nrow(survivors))

# 3. Define readmission outcome (90 days only, NO prolonged LOS)
survivors[, outcome_readmit := as.integer(!is.na(readmit_date) & 
                                          time_to_readmission >= 0 & 
                                          time_to_readmission <= 90)]

cat("Readmission within 90 days:", sum(survivors$outcome_readmit, na.rm=TRUE), "\n")
cat("Readmission rate:", round(100*mean(survivors$outcome_readmit, na.rm=TRUE), 1), "%\n\n")

# 4. Readmission timing breakdown
survivors[outcome_readmit == 1, .(
  early_readmit = sum(time_to_readmission <= 14, na.rm=TRUE),
  month_readmit = sum(time_to_readmission <= 30, na.rm=TRUE),
  quarter_readmit = sum(time_to_readmission <= 90, na.rm=TRUE)
)]

db_0.1_coded <- merge(
  db_0.1_coded,
  survivors[, .(code, outcome_readmit)],
  by = "code",
  all.x = TRUE
)

db_0.1_coded <- db_0.1_coded[!is.na(outcome_readmit)]

## Table 1.  Demographics

# Prepare data - ALL patients (922) and survivors split by readmission
all_patients <- patient_data[, .(
  code, age_lt, gender, bmi_recip, final_meld, age_don, 
  donor_type, multiorg_id, postop_los, death_equal_initialdc
)]

# Three groups
group_all <- all_patients
group_no_readmit <- survivors[outcome_readmit == 0]
group_readmit <- survivors[outcome_readmit == 1]

# Create baseline table
baseline_table <- data.table(
  Characteristic = c(
    "N",
    "Recipient age, years",
    "    Mean ± SD",
    "    Median (IQR)",
    "Male gender, n (%)",
    "BMI, kg/m² (mean ± SD)",
    "Pre-transplant MELD (mean ± SD)",
    "Donor age, years",
    "    Mean ± SD",
    "    Median (IQR)",
    "Donor type",
    "    DBD, n (%)",
    "    DCD, n (%)",
    "    Living/Domino, n (%)",
    "Multi-organ transplant, n (%)",
    "Length of stay, days",
    "    Mean ± SD",
    "    Median (IQR)"
  ),
  `All Patients (N=922)` = c(
    # N
    nrow(group_all),
    # Recipient age header
    "",
    # Mean recipient age
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_all$age_lt, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_all$age_lt, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Median recipient age
    sprintf("%.0f (%.0f-%.0f)", 
            median(group_all$age_lt, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_all$age_lt, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_all$age_lt, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Male gender
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_all$gender == "male", na.rm=TRUE), 
            100*mean(group_all$gender == "male", na.rm=TRUE)),
    # BMI
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_all$bmi_recip, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_all$bmi_recip, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # MELD
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_all$final_meld, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_all$final_meld, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Donor age header
    "",
    # Mean donor age
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_all$age_don, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_all$age_don, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Median donor age
    sprintf("%.0f (%.0f-%.0f)", 
            median(group_all$age_don, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_all$age_don, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_all$age_don, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Donor type header
    "",
    # DBD
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_all$donor_type == "dbd", na.rm=TRUE),
            100*mean(group_all$donor_type == "dbd", na.rm=TRUE)),
    # DCD
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_all$donor_type == "dcd", na.rm=TRUE),
            100*mean(group_all$donor_type == "dcd", na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Living/Domino
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_all$donor_type == "living/domino", na.rm=TRUE),
            100*mean(group_all$donor_type == "living/domino", na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Multi-organ
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_all$multiorg_id == 1, na.rm=TRUE),
            100*mean(group_all$multiorg_id == 1, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # LOS header
    "",
    # Mean LOS
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_all$postop_los, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_all$postop_los, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Median LOS
    sprintf("%.0f (%.0f-%.0f)", 
            median(group_all$postop_los, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_all$postop_los, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_all$postop_los, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE))
  ),
  `Not Readmitted (N=560)` = c(
    # N
    nrow(group_no_readmit),
    # Recipient age header
    "",
    # Mean recipient age
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_no_readmit$age_lt, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_no_readmit$age_lt, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Median recipient age
    sprintf("%.0f (%.0f-%.0f)", 
            median(group_no_readmit$age_lt, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_no_readmit$age_lt, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_no_readmit$age_lt, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Male gender
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_no_readmit$gender == "male", na.rm=TRUE), 
            100*mean(group_no_readmit$gender == "male", na.rm=TRUE)),
    # BMI
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_no_readmit$bmi_recip, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_no_readmit$bmi_recip, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # MELD
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_no_readmit$final_meld, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_no_readmit$final_meld, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Donor age header
    "",
    # Mean donor age
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_no_readmit$age_don, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_no_readmit$age_don, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Median donor age
    sprintf("%.0f (%.0f-%.0f)", 
            median(group_no_readmit$age_don, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_no_readmit$age_don, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_no_readmit$age_don, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Donor type header
    "",
    # DBD
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_no_readmit$donor_type == "dbd", na.rm=TRUE),
            100*mean(group_no_readmit$donor_type == "dbd", na.rm=TRUE)),
    # DCD
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_no_readmit$donor_type == "dcd", na.rm=TRUE),
            100*mean(group_no_readmit$donor_type == "dcd", na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Living/Domino
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_no_readmit$donor_type == "living/domino", na.rm=TRUE),
            100*mean(group_no_readmit$donor_type == "living/domino", na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Multi-organ
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_no_readmit$multiorg_id == 1, na.rm=TRUE),
            100*mean(group_no_readmit$multiorg_id == 1, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # LOS header
    "",
    # Mean LOS
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_no_readmit$postop_los, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_no_readmit$postop_los, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Median LOS
    sprintf("%.0f (%.0f-%.0f)", 
            median(group_no_readmit$postop_los, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_no_readmit$postop_los, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_no_readmit$postop_los, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE))
  ),
  `Readmitted (N=342)` = c(
    # N
    nrow(group_readmit),
    # Recipient age header
    "",
    # Mean recipient age
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_readmit$age_lt, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_readmit$age_lt, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Median recipient age
    sprintf("%.0f (%.0f-%.0f)", 
            median(group_readmit$age_lt, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_readmit$age_lt, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_readmit$age_lt, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Male gender
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_readmit$gender == "male", na.rm=TRUE), 
            100*mean(group_readmit$gender == "male", na.rm=TRUE)),
    # BMI
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_readmit$bmi_recip, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_readmit$bmi_recip, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # MELD
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_readmit$final_meld, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_readmit$final_meld, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Donor age header
    "",
    # Mean donor age
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_readmit$age_don, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_readmit$age_don, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Median donor age
    sprintf("%.0f (%.0f-%.0f)", 
            median(group_readmit$age_don, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_readmit$age_don, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_readmit$age_don, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Donor type header
    "",
    # DBD
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_readmit$donor_type == "dbd", na.rm=TRUE),
            100*mean(group_readmit$donor_type == "dbd", na.rm=TRUE)),
    # DCD
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_readmit$donor_type == "dcd", na.rm=TRUE),
            100*mean(group_readmit$donor_type == "dcd", na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Living/Domino
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_readmit$donor_type == "living/domino", na.rm=TRUE),
            100*mean(group_readmit$donor_type == "living/domino", na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Multi-organ
    sprintf("%d (%.1f%%)", sum(group_readmit$multiorg_id == 1, na.rm=TRUE),
            100*mean(group_readmit$multiorg_id == 1, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # LOS header
    "",
    # Mean LOS
    sprintf("%.1f ± %.1f", mean(group_readmit$postop_los, na.rm=TRUE), sd(group_readmit$postop_los, na.rm=TRUE)),
    # Median LOS
    sprintf("%.0f (%.0f-%.0f)", 
            median(group_readmit$postop_los, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_readmit$postop_los, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE),
            quantile(group_readmit$postop_los, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE))
  )
)

# Create flextable
table1 <- flextable(baseline_table) %>%
  set_header_labels(
    Characteristic = "Characteristic",
    `All Patients (N=922)` = "All Patients (N=922)",
    `Not Readmitted (N=560)` = "Not Readmitted (N=560)",
    `Readmitted (N=342)` = "Readmitted (N=342)"
  ) %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = c("", "", "Survived to Discharge"),
    colwidths = c(1, 1, 2)
  ) %>%
  theme_booktabs() %>%
  align(i = 1, j = 3, align = "center", part = "header") %>%
  padding(i = 1, j = 3, padding.left = 20, padding.right = 65, part = "header") %>%
  hline(i = 1, j = 3:4, border = officer::fp_border(width = 2), part = "header") %>%
  padding(i = c(3, 4, 9, 10, 12, 13, 14, 17, 18), j = 1, padding.left = 20, part = "body") %>%  # Indent all sub-rows including LOS
  padding(padding.top = 2, padding.bottom = 2, part = "body") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  bold(i = c(2, 8, 11, 16), j = 1, part = "body") %>%  # Bold header rows: Recipient age, Donor age, Donor type, LOS
  align(align = "left", part = "all", j = 1) %>%
  align(align = "right", part = "all", j = 2:4) %>%
  bold(i = 1, part = "body") %>%
  fontsize(size = 10, part = "body") %>%
  add_footer_lines("SD = standard deviation; IQR = interquartile range; BMI = body mass index; MELD = Model for End-Stage Liver Disease; DCD = donation after cardiac death; DBD = donation after brain death") %>%
  fontsize(size = 9, part = "footer")

table1 <- set_table_properties(table1, width = 1, layout = "autofit")
doc <- read_docx()
doc <- body_add_flextable(doc, value = table1)
print(doc, target = here("readmission_tables_figures","table1.docx"))

## feature engineering 

cat("\n=== FEATURE ENGINEERING ===\n\n")
build_features <- function(data, day7_only = FALSE, outcome_col = "outcome_readmit") {
  
  # Filter to Day 7 if specified
  if (day7_only) {
    data <- data[timestamp <= 168]
  }
  
  # Get outcome
  outcome_data <- unique(data[, c("code", outcome_col), with = FALSE])
  setnames(outcome_data, outcome_col, "the_outcome")
  
  # Get static variables
  static_data <- unique(data[, .(
    code, gender, abo, age_lt, age_don, bmi_recip, multiorg_id, 
    donor_type, final_meld_peld_lab_score, dc_code, postop_los
  )])
  
  # Cast to wide format
  data_wide <- dcast(data,
    code + timestamp ~ lab_name,
    value.var = "ord_value", 
    fun.aggregate = mean)
  
  setorder(data_wide, code, timestamp)
  
  # Aggregate features by patient
  features <- data_wide[, {
    
    # Define time windows
    pre_data  <- .SD[timestamp < 0]
    if(nrow(pre_data) > 0) setorder(pre_data, -timestamp)
    
    pod0_data <- .SD[timestamp >= 6 & timestamp < 24]
    traj_data <- .SD[timestamp >= 0]
    
    list(
      # ===== BASELINE FEATURES =====
      var_cr_baseline = if(nrow(pre_data)>0) pre_data$var_cr[1] else NA_real_,
      var_tbili_baseline = if(nrow(pre_data)>0) pre_data$var_tbili[1] else NA_real_,
      var_inr_baseline = if(nrow(pre_data)>0) pre_data$var_inr[1] else NA_real_,
      var_alb_baseline = if(nrow(pre_data)>0) pre_data$var_alb[1] else NA_real_,
      var_na_baseline = if(nrow(pre_data)>0) pre_data$var_na[1] else NA_real_,
      
      # ===== POD0 FEATURES =====
      var_cr_pod0 = if(nrow(pod0_data)>0) mean(pod0_data$var_cr, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      var_tbili_pod0 = if(nrow(pod0_data)>0) mean(pod0_data$var_tbili, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      var_inr_pod0 = if(nrow(pod0_data)>0) mean(pod0_data$var_inr, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      var_ast_pod0 = if(nrow(pod0_data)>0) mean(pod0_data$var_ast, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      var_lactate_pod0 = if(nrow(pod0_data)>0) mean(pod0_data$var_lactate, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      var_ph_pod0 = if(nrow(pod0_data)>0) mean(pod0_data$var_ph, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      var_plt_pod0 = if(nrow(pod0_data)>0) mean(pod0_data$var_plt, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      
      # ===== TRAJECTORY FEATURES =====
      var_cr_traj_max = if(nrow(traj_data)>0) max(traj_data$var_cr, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      var_cr_traj_mean = if(nrow(traj_data)>0) mean(traj_data$var_cr, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      var_cr_traj_last = if(nrow(traj_data)>0) traj_data[.N]$var_cr else NA_real_,
      var_ast_traj_max = if(nrow(traj_data)>0) max(traj_data$var_ast, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      var_lactate_traj_max = if(nrow(traj_data)>0) max(traj_data$var_lactate, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      var_tbili_traj_mean = if(nrow(traj_data)>0) mean(traj_data$var_tbili, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      var_tbili_traj_last = if(nrow(traj_data)>0) traj_data[.N]$var_tbili else NA_real_,
      var_inr_traj_mean = if(nrow(traj_data)>0) mean(traj_data$var_inr, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      var_inr_traj_last = if(nrow(traj_data)>0) traj_data[.N]$var_inr else NA_real_,
      
      # ===== TEMPORAL DYNAMICS =====
      ast_traj_sd = if(nrow(traj_data) > 1) sd(traj_data$var_ast, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      cr_traj_sd = if(nrow(traj_data) > 1) sd(traj_data$var_cr, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      tbili_traj_sd = if(nrow(traj_data) > 1) sd(traj_data$var_tbili, na.rm=T) else NA_real_,
      
      ast_slope = if(nrow(traj_data) > 2 && sum(!is.na(traj_data$var_ast)) > 2) {
        tryCatch(coef(lm(var_ast ~ timestamp, data=traj_data[!is.na(var_ast)]))[2], 
                 error = function(e) NA_real_)
      } else NA_real_,
      
      cr_slope = if(nrow(traj_data) > 2 && sum(!is.na(traj_data$var_cr)) > 2) {
        tryCatch(coef(lm(var_cr ~ timestamp, data=traj_data[!is.na(var_cr)]))[2],
                 error = function(e) NA_real_)
      } else NA_real_,
      
      ast_peak_hour = if(nrow(traj_data) > 0 && !all(is.na(traj_data$var_ast))) {
        traj_data[which.max(var_ast)]$timestamp
      } else NA_real_,
      
      cr_peak_hour = if(nrow(traj_data) > 0 && !all(is.na(traj_data$var_cr))) {
        traj_data[which.max(var_cr)]$timestamp  
      } else NA_real_,
      
      # ===== TACROLIMUS FEATURES =====
      var_tac_mean = if("var_tac" %in% names(traj_data) && 
                        sum(!is.na(traj_data$var_tac)) > 0) {
        mean(traj_data$var_tac, na.rm = TRUE)
      } else NA_real_,
      
      var_tac_cv = if("var_tac" %in% names(traj_data) && 
                      sum(!is.na(traj_data$var_tac)) > 1) {
        sd_val <- sd(traj_data$var_tac, na.rm = TRUE)
        mean_val <- mean(traj_data$var_tac, na.rm = TRUE)
        if (!is.na(mean_val) && mean_val > 0) sd_val / mean_val else NA_real_
      } else NA_real_,
      
      var_tac_last = if("var_tac" %in% names(traj_data) && 
                        sum(!is.na(traj_data$var_tac)) > 0) {
        traj_data[!is.na(var_tac)][.N]$var_tac
      } else NA_real_,
      
      var_tac_n_levels = if("var_tac" %in% names(traj_data)) {
        sum(!is.na(traj_data$var_tac))
      } else 0L
    )
  }, by = code]
  
  # Merge with static data and outcome
  features <- merge(features, static_data, by = "code")
  features <- merge(features, outcome_data, by = "code")
  
  # Clean infinites
  for (col in names(features)) {
    if (is.numeric(features[[col]])) {
      features[is.infinite(get(col)), (col) := NA_real_]
    }
  }
  
  # ===== DERIVED FEATURES =====
  
  # Demographics
  features[, gender_numeric := ifelse(gender == "male", 1L, 0L)]
  features[, `:=`(
    abo_a = ifelse(abo == "a", 1L, 0L),
    abo_b = ifelse(abo == "b", 1L, 0L),
    abo_ab = ifelse(abo == "ab", 1L, 0L)
  )]
  
  # MELD scores
  features[, meld_pre := pmin(
    3.78*log(pmax(var_tbili_baseline,1)) + 
    11.2*log(pmax(var_inr_baseline,1)) +
    9.57*log(pmax(var_cr_baseline,1)) + 6.43, 40)]
  
  features[, meld_pod0 := pmin(
    3.78*log(pmax(var_tbili_pod0,1)) + 
    11.2*log(pmax(var_inr_pod0,1)) +
    9.57*log(pmax(var_cr_pod0,1)) + 6.43, 40)]
  
  features[, meld_d7 := pmin(
    3.78*log(pmax(var_tbili_traj_last,1)) + 
    11.2*log(pmax(var_inr_traj_last,1)) +
    9.57*log(pmax(var_cr_traj_last,1)) + 6.43, 40)]
  
  # Rate of change
  features[, `:=`(
    ast_rise_rate = ifelse(!is.na(var_ast_traj_max) & !is.na(var_ast_pod0),
                           (var_ast_traj_max - var_ast_pod0) / 6, NA_real_),
    cr_rise_rate = ifelse(!is.na(var_cr_traj_max) & !is.na(var_cr_baseline),
                          (var_cr_traj_max - var_cr_baseline) / 7, NA_real_)
  )]
  
  # Peak timing indicators
  features[, `:=`(
    ast_early_peak = as.integer(!is.na(ast_peak_hour) & ast_peak_hour <= 48),
    ast_late_peak = as.integer(!is.na(ast_peak_hour) & ast_peak_hour > 96)
  )]
  
  # Donor type
  if (!all(is.na(features$donor_type))) {
    features[, donor_living := as.integer(donor_type == "living/domino")]
    features[, donor_dcd := as.integer(donor_type == "dcd")]
    features[, donor_dbd := as.integer(donor_type == "dbd")]
  }
  
  # LOS features (for retrospective model only)
  if (!day7_only) {
    features[, `:=`(
      los_log = log(postop_los + 1),
      los_prolonged = as.integer(postop_los > 14),
      discharge_home = as.integer(dc_code == "home"),
      discharge_facility = as.integer(dc_code == "facility")
    )]
  }
  
  # Clinical flags
  features[, `:=`(
    ast_severe = as.integer(!is.na(var_ast_traj_max) & var_ast_traj_max > 2000),
    aki_pod0 = as.integer(!is.na(var_cr_pod0) & !is.na(var_cr_baseline) &
                          var_cr_baseline > 0 & var_cr_pod0 > 1.5*var_cr_baseline)
  )]
  
  # KEY INTERACTION: Tacrolimus CV × Creatinine
  features[, tac_cv_x_cr := var_tac_cv * var_cr_traj_max]
  
  # Other interactions
  features[, `:=`(
    age_don_x_meld = age_don * meld_pre,
    ast_x_age = var_ast_traj_max * age_lt,
    bmi_x_age = bmi_recip * age_lt
  )]
  
  setnames(features, "the_outcome", outcome_col)
  return(features)
}

## Build  models
cat("Building retrospective model features (all data) \n")
phase_mr <- build_features(
  data = db_0.1_coded,
  day7_only = FALSE,
  outcome_col = "outcome_readmit"
)

cat("Building Day 7 model features \n")
phase_mrp <- build_features(
  data = db_0.1_coded,
  day7_only = TRUE,
  outcome_col = "outcome_readmit"
)

cat("Retrospective features created:", ncol(phase_mr) - 1, "\n")
cat("Day 7 features created:", ncol(phase_mrp) - 1, "\n\n")

## MATRIX PREPARATION 

prepare_matrix <- function(phase, outcome_col, exclude_extra = NULL) {
  
  excl <- c("code", outcome_col, "gender", "abo", "dc_code", 
            "donor_type", "final_meld_peld_lab_score", 
            "postop_los",exclude_extra)
  pred_cols <- setdiff(names(phase), excl)
  
  # Remove high-missingness columns
  na_frac <- sapply(phase[, ..pred_cols], function(x) mean(is.na(x)))
  good <- names(na_frac[na_frac < 0.5])
  
  # Calculate variance only on numeric columns
  numeric_cols <- names(which(sapply(phase[, ..good], is.numeric)))
  vv <- sapply(phase[, ..numeric_cols], function(x) var(x, na.rm = TRUE))
  good <- names(vv[!is.na(vv) & vv > 0.01])
  
  # Impute with median
  meds <- sapply(phase[, ..good], median, na.rm = TRUE)
  X <- as.matrix(phase[, ..good])
  for (j in seq_along(good)) {
    m <- if(is.na(meds[j])) 0 else meds[j]
    X[is.na(X[,j]) | is.infinite(X[,j]), j] <- m
  }
  
  y <- phase[[outcome_col]]
  list(X = X, y = y, feature_names = good)
}

cat("Preparing matrices...\n")
mat_mr <- prepare_matrix(phase_mr, "outcome_readmit")
mat_mrp <- prepare_matrix(phase_mrp, "outcome_readmit")

cat("Retrospective matrix:", nrow(mat_mr$X), "patients ×", ncol(mat_mr$X), "features\n")
cat("Day 7 matrix:", nrow(mat_mrp$X), "patients ×", ncol(mat_mrp$X), "features\n\n")

## model training 

cat("\n=== MODEL TRAINING ===\n")

train_xgb_cv <- function(X, y, model_name, n_folds = 5, seed = 123) {
  
  set.seed(seed)
  
  # Create stratified folds
  folds <- caret::createFolds(y, k = n_folds, list = TRUE)
  
  # XGBoost parameters
  params <- list(
    objective = "binary:logistic",
    eval_metric = "auc",
    max_depth = 3,
    eta = 0.01,
    min_child_weight = 20,
    gamma = 1,
    lambda = 2,
    alpha = 1,
    scale_pos_weight = sum(y == 0) / sum(y == 1)  # Class imbalance
  )
  
  # Storage
  aucs <- numeric(n_folds)
  models <- list()
  preds_list <- list()
  
  cat(sprintf("Training %s with %d-fold CV...\n", model_name, n_folds))
  
  for (i in seq_along(folds)) {
    
    # Split data
    test_idx <- folds[[i]]
    train_idx <- setdiff(1:nrow(X), test_idx)
    
    dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = X[train_idx, ], label = y[train_idx])
    dtest <- xgb.DMatrix(data = X[test_idx, ], label = y[test_idx])
    
    # Train
    bst <- xgb.train(
      params = params,
      data = dtrain,
      nrounds = 500,
      watchlist = list(train = dtrain, test = dtest),
      early_stopping_rounds = 50,
      verbose = 0
    )
    
    # Predict
    preds <- predict(bst, dtest)
    
    # AUC
    roc_obj <- pROC::roc(y[test_idx], preds, quiet = TRUE)
    aucs[i] <- as.numeric(roc_obj$auc)
    
    # Store
    models[[i]] <- bst
    preds_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
      idx = test_idx,
      y_true = y[test_idx],
      y_pred = preds
    )
    
    cat(sprintf("  Fold %d: AUC = %.3f\n", i, aucs[i]))
  }
  

  # Combine predictions
  all_preds <- do.call(rbind, preds_list)
  all_preds <- all_preds[order(all_preds$idx), ]
  
  # Overall AUC
  roc_overall <- pROC::roc(all_preds$y_true, all_preds$y_pred, quiet = TRUE)
  
  cat(sprintf("\n%s Results:\n", model_name))
  cat(sprintf("  Mean AUC: %.3f ± %.3f\n", mean(aucs), sd(aucs)))
  cat(sprintf("  Overall AUC: %.3f (95%% CI: %.3f-%.3f)\n\n",
              as.numeric(roc_overall$auc),
              as.numeric(ci.auc(roc_overall))[1],
              as.numeric(ci.auc(roc_overall))[3]))
  
  # Feature importance from best model
  best_idx <- which.max(aucs)
  importance <- xgb.importance(colnames(X), model = models[[best_idx]])
  
  return(list(
    models = models,
    predictions = all_preds,
    aucs = aucs,
    roc = roc_overall,
    importance = importance,
    params = params
  ))
}

# Train models
results_mr <- train_xgb_cv(mat_mr$X, mat_mr$y, "Retrospective Model", seed = 20190804)
results_mrp <- train_xgb_cv(mat_mrp$X, mat_mrp$y, "Day 7 Model", seed = 20250813)

# Calculate prospective loss
loss_pct <- 100 * (as.numeric(results_mr$roc$auc) - as.numeric(results_mrp$roc$auc)) / 
                  as.numeric(results_mr$roc$auc)
cat(sprintf("Prospective Performance Loss: %.1f%%\n", loss_pct))

## PERFORMANCE SUMMARY TABLE 
cat("\n=== MODEL PERFORMANCE SUMMARY ===\n")
# Function to calculate 95% CI using t-distribution (n=5, df=4)
calc_ci_t <- function(aucs) {
  m <- mean(aucs)
  se <- sd(aucs) / sqrt(length(aucs))
  df <- length(aucs) - 1
  t_crit <- qt(0.975, df)
  c(lower = m - t_crit * se, upper = m + t_crit * se)
}

# Calculate CIs
ci_mr <- calc_ci_t(results_mr$aucs)
ci_mrp <- calc_ci_t(results_mrp$aucs)

# Calculate Brier scores
brier_mr <- mean((results_mr$predictions$y_pred - results_mr$predictions$y_true)^2)
brier_mrp <- mean((results_mrp$predictions$y_pred - results_mrp$predictions$y_true)^2)

# Create performance data frame
model_performance_df <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Complete Model", "Day 7 Model"),
  N = c(nrow(mat_mr$X), nrow(mat_mrp$X)),
  Events = c(sum(mat_mr$y), sum(mat_mrp$y)),
  Mean_AUC = c(mean(results_mr$aucs), mean(results_mrp$aucs)),
  SD_AUC = c(sd(results_mr$aucs), sd(results_mrp$aucs)),
  CI_Lower = c(ci_mr["lower"], ci_mrp["lower"]),
  CI_Upper = c(ci_mr["upper"], ci_mrp["upper"]),
  Brier_Score = c(brier_mr, brier_mrp),
  Overall_AUC = c(as.numeric(results_mr$roc$auc), as.numeric(results_mrp$roc$auc))
)

# Add formatted AUC with CI column
model_performance_df$AUC_95CI <- sprintf("%.3f (%.3f-%.3f)", 
                                          model_performance_df$Mean_AUC,
                                          model_performance_df$CI_Lower,
                                          model_performance_df$CI_Upper)

# Add formatted overall AUC with CI
model_performance_df$Overall_AUC_95CI <- sprintf("%.3f (%.3f-%.3f)",
                                                  model_performance_df$Overall_AUC,
                                                  as.numeric(ci.auc(results_mr$roc))[1],
                                                  as.numeric(ci.auc(results_mr$roc))[3])

# For Day 7 model overall AUC CI
model_performance_df$Overall_AUC_95CI[2] <- sprintf("%.3f (%.3f-%.3f)",
                                                      model_performance_df$Overall_AUC[2],
                                                      as.numeric(ci.auc(results_mrp$roc))[1],
                                                      as.numeric(ci.auc(results_mrp$roc))[3])

# Add performance loss
model_performance_df$Performance_Loss <- c("—", sprintf("%.1f%%", loss_pct))

# Calculate additional metrics
calculate_metrics <- function(predictions, threshold = 0.5) {
  pred_class <- ifelse(predictions$y_pred >= threshold, 1, 0)
  
  tp <- sum(pred_class == 1 & predictions$y_true == 1)
  tn <- sum(pred_class == 0 & predictions$y_true == 0)
  fp <- sum(pred_class == 1 & predictions$y_true == 0)
  fn <- sum(pred_class == 0 & predictions$y_true == 1)
  
  sens <- tp / (tp + fn)
  spec <- tn / (tn + fp)
  ppv <- tp / (tp + fp)
  npv <- tn / (tn + fn)
  
  # Brier score
  brier <- mean((predictions$y_pred - predictions$y_true)^2)
  
  list(
    sensitivity = sens,
    specificity = spec,
    ppv = ppv,
    npv = npv,
    brier = brier
  )
}

metrics_mr <- calculate_metrics(results_mr$predictions)
metrics_mrp <- calculate_metrics(results_mrp$predictions)

perf_table <- data.table(
  Model = c("Retrospective", "Day 7"),
  Sensitivity = sprintf("%.3f", c(metrics_mr$sensitivity, metrics_mrp$sensitivity)),
  Specificity = sprintf("%.3f", c(metrics_mr$specificity, metrics_mrp$specificity)),
  PPV = sprintf("%.3f", c(metrics_mr$ppv, metrics_mrp$ppv)),
  NPV = sprintf("%.3f", c(metrics_mr$npv, metrics_mrp$npv)),
  `Brier Score` = sprintf("%.3f", c(metrics_mr$brier, metrics_mrp$brier))
)

# Print table
cat("\nModel Performance Table:\n")
print(model_performance_df)

# Save as CSV
write.csv(model_performance_df, here("readmission_csv","model_performance_readmission.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
cat("\nSaved to: model_performance_readmission.csv\n")

# Print clean summary for manuscript
cat("\n=== FOR MANUSCRIPT ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Complete Model: AUC %.3f (95%% CI: %.3f-%.3f), Brier %.3f\n",
            model_performance_df$Mean_AUC[1],
            model_performance_df$CI_Lower[1],
            model_performance_df$CI_Upper[1],
            model_performance_df$Brier_Score[1]))

cat(sprintf("Day 7 Model: AUC %.3f (95%% CI: %.3f-%.3f), Brier %.3f\n",
            model_performance_df$Mean_AUC[2],
            model_performance_df$CI_Lower[2],
            model_performance_df$CI_Upper[2],
            model_performance_df$Brier_Score[2]))

cat(sprintf("Performance Loss: %.1f%%\n", loss_pct))

library(flextable)
library(officer)

# Create comprehensive performance table
supp_perf_table <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Complete", "Day 7"),
  N = c(nrow(mat_mr$X), nrow(mat_mrp$X)),
  Events = c(sum(mat_mr$y), sum(mat_mrp$y)),
  
  # AUC metrics
  Overall_AUC = sprintf("%.3f (%.3f-%.3f)",
                        c(as.numeric(results_mr$roc$auc), as.numeric(results_mrp$roc$auc)),
                        c(as.numeric(ci.auc(results_mr$roc))[1], as.numeric(ci.auc(results_mrp$roc))[1]),
                        c(as.numeric(ci.auc(results_mr$roc))[3], as.numeric(ci.auc(results_mrp$roc))[3])),
  
  Mean_CV_AUC = sprintf("%.3f ± %.3f",
                        c(mean(results_mr$aucs), mean(results_mrp$aucs)),
                        c(sd(results_mr$aucs), sd(results_mrp$aucs))),
  
  # Classification metrics at threshold 0.5
  Sensitivity = sprintf("%.3f", c(metrics_mr$sensitivity, metrics_mrp$sensitivity)),
  Specificity = sprintf("%.3f", c(metrics_mr$specificity, metrics_mrp$specificity)),
  PPV = sprintf("%.3f", c(metrics_mr$ppv, metrics_mrp$ppv)),
  NPV = sprintf("%.3f", c(metrics_mr$npv, metrics_mrp$npv)),
  
  # Calibration
  Brier_Score = sprintf("%.3f", c(brier_mr, brier_mrp)),
  
  # Performance difference
  Loss = c("—", sprintf("%.1f%%", loss_pct))
)

# Create flextable
supp_table1 <- flextable(supp_perf_table) %>%
  set_header_labels(
    Model = "Model",
    N = "N",
    Events = "Events",
    Overall_AUC = "Overall AUC\n(95% CI)",
    Mean_CV_AUC = "Mean CV AUC\n± SD",
    Sensitivity = "Sensitivity",
    Specificity = "Specificity",
    PPV = "PPV",
    NPV = "NPV",
    Brier_Score = "Brier Score",
    Loss = "Performance\nLoss"
  ) %>%
  theme_booktabs() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  align(align = "left", part = "all", j = 1) %>%
  fontsize(size = 8, part = "body") %>%
  fontsize(size = 8, part = "header") %>%
  padding(padding.top = 3, padding.bottom = 3, part = "body") %>%
  add_footer_lines(
    "Overall AUC calculated from pooled out-of-fold predictions using DeLong method. Mean CV AUC represents average across 5 cross-validation folds with t-distribution 95% confidence intervals (df=4). Classification metrics calculated at threshold 0.5. PPV = positive predictive value, NPV = negative predictive value. Performance loss calculated as proportional decrease in overall AUC from complete to day 7 model."
  ) %>%
  fontsize(size = 8, part = "footer") %>%
  italic(part = "footer") %>%
  width(j = 1, width = 0.5) %>%
  width(j = 2:3, width = 0.5) %>%
  width(j = 4:5, width = 1.2) %>%
  width(j = 6:9, width = 0.5) %>%
  width(j = 10:11, width = 0.6)

(supp_table1)
supp_table1 <- set_table_properties(supp_table1, width = 1, layout = "autofit")
doc <- read_docx()
doc <- body_add_flextable(doc, value = supp_table1)
print(doc, target = here("readmission_tables_figures","supp_table1.docx"))

# ROC plots

library(ggplot2)
library(pROC)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(gridExtra)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(scales)
library(data.table)

# Set theme for all plots
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))

# Custom color palette
# colors_model <- c("Retrospective" = "#2E86AB", "Day 7" = "#A23B72")
# colors_risk <- c("Low Risk" = "#06A77D", "High Risk" = "#D62246")

#| label: fig-roc-curves
#| fig-cap: "Receiver Operating Characteristic curves comparing Day 7 early prediction model to complete data model. Minimal performance loss demonstrates feasibility of early risk stratification."
#| fig-width: 6
#| fig-height: 5

# Create ROC objects
# Your existing ROC objects (already created)
roc_mr <- roc(results_mr$predictions$y_true, results_mr$predictions$y_pred, quiet = TRUE)
roc_mrp <- roc(results_mrp$predictions$y_true, results_mrp$predictions$y_pred, quiet = TRUE)

# Calculate AUCs and CIs
auc_mr <- as.numeric(auc(roc_mr))
ci_mr <- as.numeric(ci.auc(roc_mr))

auc_mrp <- as.numeric(auc(roc_mrp))
ci_mrp <- as.numeric(ci.auc(roc_mrp))

# Create labels with AUC and CI
label_mr <- sprintf("Complete data: AUC %.3f (95%% CI %.3f-%.3f)", 
                    auc_mr, ci_mr[1], ci_mr[3])

label_mrp <- sprintf("Day 7 restricted: AUC %.3f (95%% CI %.3f-%.3f)", 
                     auc_mrp, ci_mrp[1], ci_mrp[3])

# Extract coordinates WITH updated labels
roc_mr_coords <- data.frame(
  sensitivity = roc_mr$sensitivities,
  specificity = roc_mr$specificities,
  model = label_mr
)

roc_mrp_coords <- data.frame(
  sensitivity = roc_mrp$sensitivities,
  specificity = roc_mrp$specificities,
  model = label_mrp
)

# Combine
roc_data <- rbind(roc_mr_coords, roc_mrp_coords)

# Set factor levels to control order
roc_data$model <- factor(roc_data$model, levels = c(label_mr, label_mrp))

# Plot
(figure2 <- ggplot(roc_data, aes(x = 1 - specificity, y = sensitivity, linetype = model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.0) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("solid", "dashed")) +
  labs(
    x = "\n1 - Specificity (False Positive Rate)",
    y = "Sensitivity (True Positive Rate)\n",
    linetype = "Model",
    title = "Figure 2.  ROC Curves: Complete Data vs Day 7 Restricted"
  ) +
  theme_prism() +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.65, 0.15),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    legend.key.width = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7, face="bold",margin = margin(l = 3, unit = "pt")),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5,vjust=-0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    aspect.ratio=0.8
  ) + 
  coord_equal())

ggsave(figure2,file=here("readmission_tables_figures","figure2.tiff"),width=6.875,height=5, units="in",dpi=600)
ggsave(figure2,file=here("clinical transplantation submission","Figure 2.tiff"),width=6.875,height=5, units="in",dpi=600)

## FEATURE IMPORTANCE 

cat("\n=== FEATURE IMPORTANCE ===\n\n")

# Top 10 for each model
(imp_mr <- results_mr$importance[1:10])
(imp_mrp <- results_mrp$importance[1:10])

cat("Top 10 Features - Retrospective Model:\n")
print(imp_mr[, .(Feature, Gain = round(Gain, 4))])

cat("\nTop 10 Features - Day 7 Model:\n")
print(imp_mrp[, .(Feature, Gain = round(Gain, 4))])

# Check if tac_cv_x_cr is in top 10
if ("tac_cv_x_cr" %in% imp_mrp$Feature[1:10]) {
  rank <- which(imp_mrp$Feature == "tac_cv_x_cr")
  cat(sprintf("\n*** KEY FINDING: tac_cv_x_cr ranks #%d (%.1f%% importance) ***\n\n", 
              rank, imp_mrp[Feature == "tac_cv_x_cr"]$Gain * 100))
}

#| label: tbl-feature-comparison
#| tbl-cap: "Top 10 predictive features for complete hospitalization and Day 7 restricted readmission models"

library(flextable)
library(officer)

# Get top 10 from each model
top10_complete <- results_mr$importance[1:10]
top10_day7 <- results_mrp$importance[1:10]

# Create comprehensive feature label mapping
feature_labels <- c(
  # Creatinine features
  "cr_traj_sd" = "Creatinine Variability (SD)",
  "var_cr_traj_max" = "Peak Creatinine",
  "var_cr_traj_mean" = "Mean Creatinine",
  "cr_peak_hour" = "Creatinine Peak Timing",
  "cr_rise_rate" = "Creatinine Rise Rate",
  
  # Tacrolimus features
  "tac_cv_x_cr" = "Tacrolimus CV × Creatinine",
  "var_tac_mean" = "Mean Tacrolimus Level",
  "var_tac_cv" = "Tacrolimus Coefficient of Variation",
  "var_tac_auc" = "Tacrolimus Area Under Curve",
  "var_tac_last" = "Last Tacrolimus Level",
  "var_tac_n_levels"="Number of tacrolimus measurements",
  
  # Liver function
  "var_tbili_traj_mean" = "Mean Bilirubin",
  "tbili_traj_sd" = "Bilirubin Variability (SD)",
  "var_ast_traj_max" = "Peak AST",
  "ast_slope" = "AST Slope",
  "ast_x_age" = "AST × Recipient Age",
  "ast_traj_sd" = "AST Variability (SD)",
  
  # Demographics
  "bmi_recip" = "Recipient BMI",
  "age_lt" = "Recipient Age",
  "age_don" = "Donor Age",
  "bmi_x_age" = "BMI × Recipient Age",
  "gender_numeric" = "Male Gender",
  
  # LOS
  "los_log" = "Length of Stay (log)",
  "los_x_age" = "Length of Stay × Age",
  
  # Other labs
  "var_lactate_pod0" = "POD 0 Lactate",
  "var_inr_pod0" = "POD 0 INR",
  "var_plt_pod0" = "POD 0 Platelet Count",
  "multiorg_id" = "Multi-organ Transplant",
  "var_tbili_pod0" = "Total Bilirubin (POD 0)"
)

# Apply labels to complete model
top10_complete[, Feature_Label := ifelse(Feature %in% names(feature_labels),
                                          feature_labels[Feature],
                                          Feature)]

# Apply labels to day 7 model
top10_day7[, Feature_Label := ifelse(Feature %in% names(feature_labels),
                                      feature_labels[Feature],
                                      Feature)]

# Create comparison table
comparison_table <- data.frame(
  Rank = 1:10,
  Complete_Feature = top10_complete$Feature_Label,
  Complete_Importance = sprintf("%.1f%%", top10_complete$Gain * 100),
  Day7_Feature = top10_day7$Feature_Label,
  Day7_Importance = sprintf("%.1f%%", top10_day7$Gain * 100)
)

# Create flextable
(table2 <- flextable(comparison_table) %>%
  set_header_labels(
    Rank = "Rank",
    Complete_Feature = "Feature",
    Complete_Importance = "Importance",
    Day7_Feature = "Feature",
    Day7_Importance = "Importance"
  ) %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = c("", "Complete Model", "Day 7 Restricted Model"),
    colwidths = c(1, 2, 2)
  ) %>%
  theme_booktabs() %>%
  align(i = 1, align = "center", part = "header") %>%
  hline(i = 1, j = 2:5, border = fp_border(width = 2), part = "header") %>%
  width(j = 1, width = 0.4) %>%              # Rank - narrow
  width(j = 2, width = 2.2) %>%              # Complete Feature - wide
  width(j = 3, width = 0.8) %>%              # Complete Importance - narrow
  width(j = 4, width = 2.2) %>%              # Day 7 Feature - wide
  width(j = 5, width = 0.8) %>% 
  # autofit() %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  fontsize(size=9,part="header")%>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all", j = c(1, 3, 5)) %>%
  align(align = "left", part = "all", j = c(2, 4)) %>%
  fontsize(size = 9, part = "body") %>%
  padding(padding.top = 3, padding.bottom = 3, part = "body") %>%
  # Highlight Tac CV × Cr rows
  bold(i = ~ Complete_Feature == "Tacrolimus CV × Creatinine", 
     j = 2:3, part = "body") %>%
  bold(i = ~ Day7_Feature == "Tacrolimus CV × Creatinine", 
     j = 4:5, part = "body") %>%
  add_footer_lines("Features ranked by gain metric from gradient-boosted decision trees") %>%
  fontsize(size = 9, part = "footer"))

table2 <- set_table_properties(table2, width = 1, layout = "autofit")
doc <- read_docx()
doc <- body_add_flextable(doc, value = table2)
print(doc, target = here("readmission_tables_figures","table2.docx"))
# save_as_image(Table2, path=here("readmission_tables_figures","Table2.png"))


## Stratified analysis TAC CV x Creatinine
cat("\n=== STRATIFIED ANALYSIS: TAC CV × CREATININE ===\n")

# Add predictions to phase data
phase_mrp[, pred_readmit := results_mrp$predictions$y_pred]

# Stratify by tac CV and creatinine
strat_data <- phase_mrp[!is.na(var_tac_cv) & !is.na(var_cr_traj_max)]

strat_summary <- strat_data[, .(
  n = .N,
  n_readmit = sum(outcome_readmit, na.rm = TRUE),
  readmit_rate = 100 * mean(outcome_readmit, na.rm = TRUE),
  median_tac_cv = median(var_tac_cv, na.rm = TRUE),
  median_cr = median(var_cr_traj_max, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(
  tac_cv_group = ifelse(var_tac_cv > 0.3, "High Tac CV (>0.3)", "Low Tac CV (≤0.3)"),
  cr_group = ifelse(var_cr_traj_max > 2.0, "High Cr (>2.0)", "Low Cr (≤2.0)")
)]

print(strat_summary[, .(tac_cv_group, cr_group, n, n_readmit, 
                        readmit_rate = sprintf("%.1f%%", readmit_rate))])

# Statistical test: high/high vs low/low
high_high <- strat_summary[tac_cv_group == "High Tac CV (>0.3)" & 
                           cr_group == "High Cr (>2.0)"]
low_low <- strat_summary[tac_cv_group == "Low Tac CV (≤0.3)" & 
                         cr_group == "Low Cr (≤2.0)"]

test_matrix <- matrix(c(
  high_high$n_readmit, high_high$n - high_high$n_readmit,
  low_low$n_readmit, low_low$n - low_low$n_readmit
), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)

chi_result <- chisq.test(test_matrix)

cat(sprintf("\nHigh/High vs Low/Low Comparison:\n"))
cat(sprintf("  High Tac CV + High Cr: %.1f%% (%d/%d)\n", 
            high_high$readmit_rate, high_high$n_readmit, high_high$n))
cat(sprintf("  Low Tac CV + Low Cr: %.1f%% (%d/%d)\n", 
            low_low$readmit_rate, low_low$n_readmit, low_low$n))
cat(sprintf("  Risk Ratio: %.2f\n", high_high$readmit_rate / low_low$readmit_rate))
cat(sprintf("  Chi-square p-value: %.4f\n\n", chi_result$p.value))

## fig-stratified-analysis
#| fig-cap: "Readmission rates stratified by tacrolimus coefficient of variation and peak creatinine. Patients with high tacrolimus variability (CV >0.3) and elevated creatinine (>2.0 mg/dL) demonstrate 49.8% readmission rate versus 24.8% in low-risk group (risk ratio 2.01, p<0.001)."
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 6

# Prepare data with cleaner labels and ordering
strat_plot_data <- copy(strat_summary)
strat_plot_data[, group := paste(tac_cv_group, "\n", cr_group)]

# Create ordered factor for plotting
strat_plot_data[, group := factor(group, levels = c(
  "Low Tac CV (≤0.3) \n Low Cr (≤2.0)",
  "High Tac CV (>0.3) \n Low Cr (≤2.0)",
  "Low Tac CV (≤0.3) \n High Cr (>2.0)",
  "High Tac CV (>0.3) \n High Cr (>2.0)"
))]

# Add color coding
strat_plot_data[, risk_level := ifelse(readmit_rate < 30, "Low", 
                                        ifelse(readmit_rate < 40, "Moderate", "High"))]

# Plot
(figure4<-ggplot(strat_plot_data, aes(x = group, y = readmit_rate, fill = risk_level)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.55, color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%\n(n=%d)", readmit_rate, n)),
            vjust = -0.30, size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Low" = "lightgray", "Moderate" = "gray60", "High" = "gray20"),
    name = "Risk Level"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "\nRisk Group",
    y = "Readmission Rate (%)\n",
    title = "Figure 4.  Readmission Risk Stratified by Tacrolimus Variability and \nPeak Creatinine\n"
  ) +
  theme_prism(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8,face="bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold",size=10),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size=9,face="bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size=10,face="bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    aspect.ratio=0.65) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 60),breaks=seq(0,60,10)))

ggsave(figure4,file=here("readmission_tables_figures","figure3.tiff"),width=6,height=4, dpi=600)
ggsave(figure4,file=here("clinical transplantation submission","Figure 4.tiff"),width=6.875,height=5, units="in",dpi=600)

## cox-survival-analysis * preferred
## echo: false

cat("=== COX PROPORTIONAL HAZARDS ANALYSIS ===\n\n")

# Prepare data
cox_data_both <- survivors[, .(
  code, age_lt, gender, age_don, multiorg_id,
  hosp_disch_date, px_stat_date, px_stat,
  time_to_readmission, readmit_date
)]

# Patient survival outcome
cox_data_both[, death := as.integer(px_stat == "d")]

# Graft survival outcome (death OR retransplant)
cox_data_both[, graft_failure := as.integer(px_stat %in% c("d", "r"))]

# Follow-up time
cox_data_both[, censor_date := as.Date("2025-08-31")]
cox_data_both[px_stat %in% c("d", "r") & !is.na(px_stat_date), censor_date := px_stat_date]
cox_data_both[, fu_time := as.numeric(difftime(censor_date, hosp_disch_date, units = "days"))]

# Cap at 365 days
cox_data_both[fu_time > 365, fu_time := 365]
cox_data_both[fu_time > 365 & death == 1, death := 0]
cox_data_both[fu_time > 365 & graft_failure == 1, graft_failure := 0]

# Remove invalid times
cox_data_both <- cox_data_both[fu_time > 0]

cat("Patient deaths:", sum(cox_data_both$death), "\n")
cat("Graft failures:", sum(cox_data_both$graft_failure), "\n\n")

cox_data_both<-cox_data_both%>%rename(
  time_to_readmit=time_to_readmission)

# Define readmission windows
cox_data_both[, readmit_14d := as.integer(!is.na(time_to_readmit) & time_to_readmit > 0 & time_to_readmit <= 14)]
cox_data_both[, readmit_30d := as.integer(!is.na(time_to_readmit) & time_to_readmit > 0 & time_to_readmit <= 30)]
cox_data_both[, readmit_90d := as.integer(!is.na(time_to_readmit) & time_to_readmit > 0 & time_to_readmit <= 90)]

# === NAÏVE MODELS - PATIENT SURVIVAL ===
cox_naive_pt_14 <- coxph(Surv(fu_time, death) ~ readmit_14d + age_lt + gender + age_don + multiorg_id, data = cox_data_both)
cox_naive_pt_30 <- coxph(Surv(fu_time, death) ~ readmit_30d + age_lt + gender + age_don + multiorg_id, data = cox_data_both)
cox_naive_pt_90 <- coxph(Surv(fu_time, death) ~ readmit_90d + age_lt + gender + age_don + multiorg_id, data = cox_data_both)

# === NAÏVE MODELS - GRAFT SURVIVAL ===
cox_naive_graft_14 <- coxph(Surv(fu_time, graft_failure) ~ readmit_14d + age_lt + gender + age_don + multiorg_id, data = cox_data_both)
cox_naive_graft_30 <- coxph(Surv(fu_time, graft_failure) ~ readmit_30d + age_lt + gender + age_don + multiorg_id, data = cox_data_both)
cox_naive_graft_90 <- coxph(Surv(fu_time, graft_failure) ~ readmit_90d + age_lt + gender + age_don + multiorg_id, data = cox_data_both)

# === TIME-VARYING MODELS - PATIENT SURVIVAL ===
cuts_14 <- sort(unique(cox_data_both[readmit_14d == 1 & time_to_readmit < 365, time_to_readmit]))
cuts_30 <- sort(unique(cox_data_both[readmit_30d == 1 & time_to_readmit < 365, time_to_readmit]))
cuts_90 <- sort(unique(cox_data_both[readmit_90d == 1 & time_to_readmit < 365, time_to_readmit]))

make_tvc <- function(data, cuts, window, outcome_var) {
  tvc <- suppressWarnings(survSplit(as.formula(paste0("Surv(fu_time, ", outcome_var, ") ~ .")), 
                                    data = as.data.frame(data), cut = cuts, episode = "interval"))
  tvc <- as.data.table(tvc)
  tvc[, readmit_status := 0]
  for (pt in unique(tvc$code)) {
    pt_time <- data[code == pt, time_to_readmit]
    if (length(pt_time) == 1 && !is.na(pt_time) && pt_time > 0 && pt_time <= window) {
      tvc[code == pt & tstart >= pt_time, readmit_status := 1]
    }
  }
  return(tvc)
}

tvc_pt_14 <- make_tvc(cox_data_both, cuts_14, 14, "death")
tvc_pt_30 <- make_tvc(cox_data_both, cuts_30, 30, "death")
tvc_pt_90 <- make_tvc(cox_data_both, cuts_90, 90, "death")

cox_tvc_pt_14 <- coxph(Surv(tstart, fu_time, death) ~ readmit_status + age_lt + gender + age_don + multiorg_id, data = tvc_pt_14)
cox_tvc_pt_30 <- coxph(Surv(tstart, fu_time, death) ~ readmit_status + age_lt + gender + age_don + multiorg_id, data = tvc_pt_30)
cox_tvc_pt_90 <- coxph(Surv(tstart, fu_time, death) ~ readmit_status + age_lt + gender + age_don + multiorg_id, data = tvc_pt_90)

# === TIME-VARYING MODELS - GRAFT SURVIVAL ===
tvc_graft_14 <- make_tvc(cox_data_both, cuts_14, 14, "graft_failure")
tvc_graft_30 <- make_tvc(cox_data_both, cuts_30, 30, "graft_failure")
tvc_graft_90 <- make_tvc(cox_data_both, cuts_90, 90, "graft_failure")

cox_tvc_graft_14 <- coxph(Surv(tstart, fu_time, graft_failure) ~ readmit_status + age_lt + gender + age_don + multiorg_id, data = tvc_graft_14)
cox_tvc_graft_30 <- coxph(Surv(tstart, fu_time, graft_failure) ~ readmit_status + age_lt + gender + age_don + multiorg_id, data = tvc_graft_30)
cox_tvc_graft_90 <- coxph(Surv(tstart, fu_time, graft_failure) ~ readmit_status + age_lt + gender + age_don + multiorg_id, data = tvc_graft_90)

cat("PATIENT SURVIVAL - 90-day:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Naïve: HR=%.2f, p=%.4f\n", 
    summary(cox_naive_pt_90)$conf.int["readmit_90d", "exp(coef)"],
    summary(cox_naive_pt_90)$coefficients["readmit_90d", "Pr(>|z|)"]))
cat(sprintf("  Time-Varying: HR=%.2f, p=%.4f\n\n",
    summary(cox_tvc_pt_90)$conf.int["readmit_status", "exp(coef)"],
    summary(cox_tvc_pt_90)$coefficients["readmit_status", "Pr(>|z|)"]))

cat("GRAFT SURVIVAL - 90-day:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Naïve: HR=%.2f, p=%.4f\n",
    summary(cox_naive_graft_90)$conf.int["readmit_90d", "exp(coef)"],
    summary(cox_naive_graft_90)$coefficients["readmit_90d", "Pr(>|z|)"]))
cat(sprintf("  Time-Varying: HR=%.2f, p=%.4f\n",
    summary(cox_tvc_graft_90)$conf.int["readmit_status", "exp(coef)"],
    summary(cox_tvc_graft_90)$coefficients["readmit_status", "Pr(>|z|)"]))


## fig-cox-forest-plot
#| fig-cap: "Forest plot comparing naïve versus time-varying Cox models for patient and graft survival. Readmission at 90 days demonstrates strongest association with both outcomes (patient survival HR 1.85, p=0.002; graft survival HR 1.74, p=0.004)."
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 6

# Extract all results
extract_hr <- function(model, var_name) {
  s <- summary(model)
  ci <- s$conf.int[var_name, ]
  coef <- s$coefficients[var_name, ]
  data.frame(
    HR = ci["exp(coef)"],
    CI_lo = ci["lower .95"],
    CI_hi = ci["upper .95"],
    p = coef["Pr(>|z|)"]
  )
}

# Patient survival results
pt_results <- rbind(
  cbind(Window = "14-Day", Model = "Naïve", Outcome = "Patient Survival", 
        extract_hr(cox_naive_pt_14, "readmit_14d")),
  cbind(Window = "14-Day", Model = "Time-Varying", Outcome = "Patient Survival", 
        extract_hr(cox_tvc_pt_14, "readmit_status")),
  cbind(Window = "30-Day", Model = "Naïve", Outcome = "Patient Survival", 
        extract_hr(cox_naive_pt_30, "readmit_30d")),
  cbind(Window = "30-Day", Model = "Time-Varying", Outcome = "Patient Survival", 
        extract_hr(cox_tvc_pt_30, "readmit_status")),
  cbind(Window = "90-Day", Model = "Naïve", Outcome = "Patient Survival", 
        extract_hr(cox_naive_pt_90, "readmit_90d")),
  cbind(Window = "90-Day", Model = "Time-Varying", Outcome = "Patient Survival", 
        extract_hr(cox_tvc_pt_90, "readmit_status"))
)

# Graft survival results
graft_results <- rbind(
  cbind(Window = "14-Day", Model = "Naïve", Outcome = "Graft Survival", 
        extract_hr(cox_naive_graft_14, "readmit_14d")),
  cbind(Window = "14-Day", Model = "Time-Varying", Outcome = "Graft Survival", 
        extract_hr(cox_tvc_graft_14, "readmit_status")),
  cbind(Window = "30-Day", Model = "Naïve", Outcome = "Graft Survival", 
        extract_hr(cox_naive_graft_30, "readmit_30d")),
  cbind(Window = "30-Day", Model = "Time-Varying", Outcome = "Graft Survival", 
        extract_hr(cox_tvc_graft_30, "readmit_status")),
  cbind(Window = "90-Day", Model = "Naïve", Outcome = "Graft Survival", 
        extract_hr(cox_naive_graft_90, "readmit_90d")),
  cbind(Window = "90-Day", Model = "Time-Varying", Outcome = "Graft Survival", 
        extract_hr(cox_tvc_graft_90, "readmit_status"))
)

# Combine
forest_data <- rbind(pt_results, graft_results)
forest_data$HR <- as.numeric(forest_data$HR)
forest_data$CI_lo <- as.numeric(forest_data$CI_lo)
forest_data$CI_hi <- as.numeric(forest_data$CI_hi)
forest_data$p <- as.numeric(forest_data$p)

# Create labels
forest_data$label <- paste0(forest_data$Window, " ", forest_data$Model)
forest_data$label <- factor(forest_data$label, 
                            levels = rev(c("14-Day Naïve", "14-Day Time-Varying",
                                          "30-Day Naïve", "30-Day Time-Varying",
                                          "90-Day Naïve", "90-Day Time-Varying")))

# Filter to patient survival only
forest_data <- forest_data[forest_data$Outcome == "Patient Survival", ]

# Plot
(figure1<-ggplot(forest_data, aes(x = HR, y = label, color = Model, shape = Model)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = CI_lo, xmax = CI_hi), width = 0.2, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f), p=%.3f", HR, CI_lo, CI_hi, p)),
            hjust = -0.75, size = 5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Naïve" = "darkgray", "Time-Varying" = "black")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Naïve" = 16, "Time-Varying" = 15)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 4, 0.5), limits = c(0, 4),expand=c(0,0)) +
  facet_wrap(~ Outcome, ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    x = "\nHazard Ratio (95% Confidence Interval)",
    y = NULL,
    title = "\nReadmission and 1-Year Patient Survival"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14,face="bold",hjust=0),
    axis.text.x=element_text(face="bold",size=14),
    axis.title.x=element_text(face="bold",hjust=0.2,size=14),
    axis.title.y=element_text(hjust=0,size=14),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust=0.65),
    aspect.ratio=1
  ))

ggsave(figure1,file=here("readmission_tables_figures","figure1.tiff"),dpi=600,height=10,width=10)

## calibration curves

#| fig-cap: "Calibration plots showing agreement between predicted probabilities and observed readmission rates for retrospective (left) and Day 7 (right) models. Points represent deciles of predicted risk with 95% confidence intervals. Diagonal reference line indicates perfect calibration."
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5

# Function to create calibration data
create_calibration_data <- function(predictions) {
  # Create 10 groups based on predicted probability
  preds_dt <- data.table(
    pred = predictions$y_pred,
    obs = predictions$y_true
  )
  
  preds_dt[, decile := cut(pred, 
                            breaks = quantile(pred, probs = seq(0, 1, 0.1)),
                            include.lowest = TRUE,
                            labels = FALSE)]
  
  # Calculate observed rate and predicted mean per decile
  cal_data <- preds_dt[, .(
    pred_mean = mean(pred),
    obs_rate = mean(obs),
    n = .N,
    se = sqrt(mean(obs) * (1 - mean(obs)) / .N)
  ), by = decile]
  
  # 95% CI for observed rate
  cal_data[, `:=`(
    ci_lower = obs_rate - 1.96 * se,
    ci_upper = obs_rate + 1.96 * se
  )]
  
  return(cal_data)
}

# Create calibration data for both models WITH Brier scores in labels
cal_mr <- create_calibration_data(results_mr$predictions)
cal_mr[, model := sprintf("Complete Data\nBrier = %.3f", brier_mr)]

cal_mrp <- create_calibration_data(results_mrp$predictions)
cal_mrp[, model := sprintf("Day 7 Restricted\nBrier = %.3f", brier_mrp)]

cal_data <- rbind(cal_mr, cal_mrp)

# Reorder model factor levels with Brier scores
cal_data$model <- factor(cal_data$model, 
                         levels = c(sprintf("Complete Data\nBrier = %.3f", brier_mr),
                                    sprintf("Day 7 Restricted\nBrier = %.3f", brier_mrp)))

# Plot
(figure4<-ggplot(cal_data, aes(x = pred_mean, y = obs_rate)) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_point(size = 3,color="black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), width = 0.03,color="black") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8,color="black") +
  facet_wrap(~ model) +
  labs(
    x = "\nPredicted Probability",
    y = "Observed Proportion",
    title = "Calibration Plots: Predicted vs Observed Readmission Rates\n") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10,hjust=0.5),
    axis.title.y=element_text(face="bold"),
    axis.title.x=element_text(face="bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    aspect.ratio=0.9
  ) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1)))

ggsave(figure4,file=here("readmission_tables_figures","figure4.tiff"),width=6,height=4,dpi=600)


# 1. AUC values
cat("Complete Model:\n")
cat("  Overall AUC:", as.numeric(roc_mr$auc), "\n")
cat("  95% CI:", as.numeric(ci.auc(roc_mr))[c(1,3)], "\n")
cat("  Mean CV AUC:", mean(results_mr$aucs), "±", sd(results_mr$aucs), "\n")

cat("\nDay 7 Model:\n")
cat("  Overall AUC:", as.numeric(roc_mrp$auc), "\n")
cat("  95% CI:", as.numeric(ci.auc(roc_mrp))[c(1,3)], "\n")
cat("  Mean CV AUC:", mean(results_mrp$aucs), "±", sd(results_mrp$aucs), "\n")

# 2. Cox HR for 90-day
# (Check your time-varying Cox output)

# 3. Tac CV × Cr importance
cat("\nTac CV × Cr Importance:\n")
cat("  Complete Model:", 
    results_mr$importance[Feature == "tac_cv_x_cr"]$Gain * 100, "%\n")
cat("  Day 7 Model:", 
    results_mrp$importance[Feature == "tac_cv_x_cr"]$Gain * 100, "%\n")

# 4. BMI importance
cat("\nBMI Importance:\n")
cat("  Complete Model:", 
    results_mr$importance[Feature == "bmi_recip"]$Gain * 100, "%\n")
cat("  Day 7 Model:", 
    results_mrp$importance[Feature == "bmi_recip"]$Gain * 100, "%\n")

## hospitalization percentage


#| label: hospitalization-trajectory

library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)

# ========== CALCULATE % HOSPITALIZED BY DAY ==========

# Use patient_data which has LOS
hosp_trajectory <- data.table(day = 0:30)

# For each day, calculate % still hospitalized
hosp_trajectory[, pct_hospitalized := sapply(day, function(d) {
  100 * mean(patient_data$postop_los >= d, na.rm = TRUE)
})]

hosp_trajectory[, n_hospitalized := sapply(day, function(d) {
  sum(patient_data$los >= d, na.rm = TRUE)
})]

# Print key timepoints
cat("\n=== HOSPITALIZATION STATUS BY DAY ===\n\n")
key_days <- c(0, 1, 3, 7, 10, 14, 21, 30)
print(hosp_trajectory[day %in% key_days, 
                      .(day, n_hospitalized, 
                        pct_hospitalized = sprintf("%.1f%%", pct_hospitalized))])

# ========== CREATE PLOT ==========

(supfig1 <- ggplot(hosp_trajectory, aes(x = day, y = pct_hospitalized)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_point(data = hosp_trajectory[day %in% c(7)], 
             aes(x = day, y = pct_hospitalized),
             size = 4) +
  
  # Add reference lines for Day 7 and Day 10
  geom_vline(xintercept = 7, linetype = "dashed", 
             linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # Add annotations
  annotate("text", x = 7, y = 95, 
           label = sprintf("%.0f%% hospitalized on POD 7", 
                          hosp_trajectory[day == 7, pct_hospitalized]),
           hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  
  
  
  # Labels and theme
  labs(
    title = "Supplementary Figure 1.  Proportion of Patients Hospitalized Over Time",
    subtitle = sprintf("N = %d liver transplant recipients", 
                      nrow(patient_data)),
    x = "\nPost-Operative Day",
    y = "Patients Still Hospitalized (%)\n"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 10, color = "gray30"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 30, 5), limits = c(0, 30)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 10), limits = c(0, 105),
                     labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")))

# Save
ggsave(supfig1,file=here("plos one submission","supplementary figure 1.tiff"),width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```
